checklist.criterion: Explicitly identifies the Must overload: 9 weeks of Must work exceeds the 6-week capacity.
Applies the failure-focused test to each of the five Must items individually.
Downgrades at least one item from Must to Should or Could with written justification.
Resulting Must tier is at or below 6 weeks of effort (100% of capacity, matching the 60% rule floor).
Explicit rationale provided for each demotion (not just a new label).
No item is demoted arbitrarily; every demotion is justified by the failure-focused test result.
Outputs a corrected MoSCoW table with updated categories.
Table includes business rationale and risk-if-omitted for each item.
All five original items appear in the corrected table (none silently dropped).
